Interface IIdentityXform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control an identity transform.

[Guid("476EA691-0668-4A2D-B575-9B1FA74455E4")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IIdentityXform : IGeodataXform
